_about: SDO stand-alone: scene id -> 3D stage background + mapobj load table. Extracted from FUN_004b43c0 (Scene_LoadBackground) in 030_scene_004b43c0.c, verified against sdo_stand_alone.exe.
_paths: Asset paths use the original game-root layout (Datas\... with backslashes); case-insensitive. Slashes normalized to / here.

_idRemaps.note: These swap to a day/night or variant scene before loading; the 0x1c & 0x1e case bodies are still listed for reference.

_instancePositions.explicit: pos values are real (code literals or initialized .data).
_instancePositions.origin: engine position table is zero-filled BSS; every instance is placed at identity and the mesh geometry is already world-positioned. In Unity, import these meshes WITHOUT recentering (keep model-space origin), or pull positions from the .bin/.msh.

_effects: Non-mapobj extras (not msh/hrc geometry) live in the per-scene 'effects' array: kind 'billboard' (2D textured quad, has texture[+scale]), 'light' (point light), or 'particle' (Effect_Play emitter, has effect id + uniform scale). Positions are decoded code literals (explicit).
_excluded: Per-scene .dds/.tga texture-animation sets used by mapobj materials are not enumerated (they belong to the .bin archives).
_base: Every scene also loads scene.msh + scene.hrc from its own archive (the base stage geometry) before mapobjs.

scenes.notes: glow billboards only, no 3D mapobj (see effects).
Shared empty body with id 27; loads base scene only.
box = 256-instance 16x16 isometric diamond grid (x=originX+(r+c)*step, z=(c-r)*step; originX -154.523, step 10.301131); ball at origin.
Underwater/sea. Only chuan has a non-origin position; the 'beach' group uses lang.msh/.hrc/.mot.
Christmas. christmas at (105,-33,236); also a guangxiao_.tga glow billboard.
Spinning-wheel stage. 'deng' = 72 light beads along an arc (real .data positions). zhuanpan spins.
GUATAN - same archive instantiated 4x; copies 3 and 4 scaled to 0.65.
house instantiated 2x (2nd far duplicate at x=2168).
38 mapobjs; only xintiandi is offset (y -120). di1-21/sky/jiguang1-3 animated.
case 0x1b - shared empty body; base scene only.
No switch case: loads base scene.msh/.hrc only (no mapobjs).
No switch case: loads base scene.msh/.hrc only (no mapobjs).
Same Room_obj set as id 37 but WITHOUT 'taizi' (13 vs 14 objects).
